steps.title: Use the examination clue
steps.content: The colon explains the invisible work particle physicists do: they closely examine subatomic particles with sophisticated technology. The blank needs a word that means carefully examining something.

steps.title: Match the precise meaning
steps.content: A means choosing, C means making, and D means making a judgment. Those meanings do not match the clue about closely examining subatomic particles. The answer is B.
